title: astragalus inflexus
intro: Astragalus inflexus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant in the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus inflexus include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced stress levels, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus inflexus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
